text_original: I love the game but the timer is BAD some people don't want to buy premium and the timer blocks them from using it free I LOVE the app but PLSS REMOVE the TIMER thank u
text_zh: 我很喜欢这个游戏，但计时器太糟糕了。有些人不想买会员，而计时器阻碍了他们免费使用。我非常喜欢这个应用，但请务必移除计时器，谢谢。
reply_original: Hi! We are thrilled to hear you love Fantasia! Regarding the timer, maintaining high-quality AI involves significant server costs. While we can't remove it entirely right now, we are exploring more ways for users to earn free messages. Your feedback is vital—please share more thoughts at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for your support!
reply_zh: 嗨！很高兴听到你喜欢 Fantasia！关于计时器，维持高质量的 AI 需要承担高昂的服务器成本。虽然我们目前无法完全移除它，但我们正在探索更多让用户赚取免费消息的方式。你的反馈至关重要——请通过 support@fantachat.ai 分享更多想法。感谢你的支持！
